title: Link to macOS CLI installer on podman.io is broken (HTTP404)
body: The "Podman CLI for macOS" button-link at https://podman.io points to https://github.com/containers/podman/releases/download/v6.0.0/podman-installer-macos-universal.pkg, but no such asset exists. Apologies if this isn't the appropriate reporting venue for the doco/website - it was the best I could find.

comments.body: Thanks! In the future, the right place for this would be on the [podman.io repo](https://github.com/containers/podman.io). The good news is we have a [fix ready](https://github.com/containers/podman.io/pull/500).
